forecasts.question: Will AGI be developed before 1 January 2030?

factors_up.factor: Musk predicts AGI by end 2026; Altman/Amodei say late 2026-early 2027

factors_down.factor: No new breakthroughs this week; definition ambiguity persists
Polymarket only 18% for OpenAI AGI by 2027

key_uncertainties: Definition of AGI remains contested across labs
Whether scaling laws continue to deliver capability gains
update_triggers: UP: Major lab announces AGI-level benchmark performance
DOWN: Scaling plateau evidence; major lab delays timeline

forecasts.question: Will economic consultancy lose ≥33% value/jobs by end 2030 due to AI?
forecasts.base_rate: No historical precedent for industry-wide 33% decline in 4 years outside recession

factors_up.factor: McKinsey planning 10% workforce cuts over 18-24 months
Big Four graduate intakes down 6-30%; 30% of companies plan AI layoffs

factors_down.factor: Firms generating billions in new AI advisory revenue
Billable-hours model creates inertia; 33% threshold extremely high

key_uncertainties: Whether AI advisory revenue offsets traditional consulting decline
Speed of client adoption of AI alternatives to consulting
update_triggers: UP: Major firm revenue drops >15% YoY; wave of mid-tier firm closures
DOWN: Consulting revenue rebounds; AI advisory becomes largest segment

forecasts.question: Will Labour be largest party at next UK General Election?
forecasts.base_rate: Governing parties win plurality ~60% of the time historically; but Labour at 19% is unprecedented

factors_up.factor: FPTP mechanics can amplify small vote share into seats
Reform may struggle to convert poll lead into seats under FPTP

factors_down.factor: YouGov 22-23 Mar: Lab 19%, sometimes third behind Greens
MRP projects Reform 335-seat majority; five-party fragmentation hurts Labour

key_uncertainties: Whether Reform can maintain lead through to next GE (by Dec 2029)
Whether FPTP translates Reform poll lead into seat majority
update_triggers: UP: Labour recovers above 25% consistently; Reform splits
DOWN: May 2026 locals confirm Reform dominance; Labour falls below 15%

forecasts.question: Will AGI be developed before 1 January 2035?
forecasts.base_rate: Metaculus median: 2033; combined forecast dashboard median: 2031

factors_up.factor: Current AI progress trajectory on track with predictions

factors_down.factor: Definition ambiguity could push goalposts
Potential for scaling plateau or regulatory slowdown

key_uncertainties: Whether current scaling paradigm continues delivering gains
Regulatory environment for frontier AI development
update_triggers: UP: AGI announced before 2030 (resolves Q1 too)
DOWN: Major scaling plateau; compute shortage; regulatory freeze

forecasts.question: Will China initiate a military blockade or invasion of Taiwan before 1 January 2030?
forecasts.base_rate: Historical base rate for major power military aggression ~5-8% per 4-year window

factors_up.factor: Justice Mission 2025 was largest-ever blockade rehearsal
Iran war creates geopolitical instability and distraction

factors_down.factor: Trump-Xi summit Mar 31-Apr 2 signals diplomatic engagement
PLAAF incursions at historic lows; 17 days with zero activity Feb-Mar
US ODNI: China unlikely to invade 2027; no fixed timeline

key_uncertainties: Outcome of Trump-Xi summit on Taiwan issue
Whether Iran war escalation affects China-Taiwan calculus
update_triggers: UP: Summit breaks down; new large-scale PLA exercises; Taiwan independence moves
DOWN: Formal cross-strait communication channels reopened; arms reduction agreement

forecasts.question: Will UK annual CPI inflation fall below 2.0% for at least one month before 1 January 2027?
forecasts.base_rate: BoE Feb forecast: CPI 2.1% in Q2 2026; Ofgem cap cut in April provides downside

factors_up.factor: Ofgem cap down 11% YoY in April; energy base effects
ING still sees possible dip to ~1.8% in April

factors_down.factor: Iran war pushing global energy prices up significantly
CNBC warns of 'brutal' inflation surge from conflict
Feb CPI still at 3.0%; BoE only forecast 2.1% pre-conflict

key_uncertainties: Duration and severity of Iran conflict's impact on energy prices
Whether April Ofgem cap cut can outweigh global energy price rises
update_triggers: UP: Iran ceasefire; oil prices fall below $70; April CPI data released sub-2%
DOWN: Oil above $100; Middle East conflict escalates; BoE revises Q2 forecast up

forecasts.question: Will Spider-Man: Brand New Day gross over $1.5B worldwide by 31 December 2026?
forecasts.base_rate: MCU films grossing $1.5B+: ~25% of all MCU films; but Spider-Man NWH hit $1.9B

factors_up.factor: Trailer crossed 1B views — first ever; 718.6M in 24hrs (2x record)
Tom Holland return after 5-year gap; massive pent-up demand

factors_down.factor: No multiverse gimmick (no Garfield/Maguire) could limit ceiling
Summer 2026 competition; global economic uncertainty from Iran war

key_uncertainties: Early review scores and audience reception
Whether hype translates without multiverse crossover
update_triggers: UP: Positive early screenings; pre-sale records broken
DOWN: Negative reviews; competing blockbusters overperform; geopolitical disruption to theatrical

forecasts.question: Will OpenAI and Anthropic have a combined ARR exceeding $70B by 31 December 2026?
forecasts.base_rate: Combined ~$44B as of Mar 2026; need 59% growth over 9 months

factors_up.factor: Anthropic enterprise revenue now exceeds OpenAI (Axios Mar 18)
Claude Code >$2.5B ARR and doubling since Jan; both firms in hypergrowth

factors_down.factor: BofA: Anthropic may owe $6.4B in cloud reseller fees; net ARR unclear
Growth rates expected to decelerate: OpenAI 2.2x, Anthropic 4x or less

key_uncertainties: Whether ARR is measured gross or net of cloud reseller payments
Whether enterprise AI adoption pace sustains through H2 2026
update_triggers: UP: Q2 ARR reports show combined >$55B; new enterprise mega-deals announced
DOWN: Growth deceleration; major customer churn; revenue accounting clarification reduces reported ARR

forecasts.question: Will UK average annual real GDP growth exceed 1.5% across the 2030s (2030-2039)?
forecasts.base_rate: OBR March 2026: medium-term potential growth 1.5% (exactly at threshold); 2010s avg ~1.5%

factors_up.factor: AI productivity gains could lift potential growth above trend
OBR forecasts 1.6% avg 2027-2030; gradual improvement trajectory

factors_down.factor: Iran war adds near-term economic headwinds
OBR potential growth estimate at 1.5% — threshold level with no margin
Structural constraints: ageing population, low business investment

key_uncertainties: Whether AI adoption genuinely raises UK productivity growth
Impact of current geopolitical conflicts on medium-term trade
update_triggers: UP: UK productivity data shows sustained improvement; AI adoption accelerates
DOWN: Recession in late 2020s; OBR revises potential growth below 1.5%
